          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))

diary_entries.entry: The meteorite changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
Year 34 on Mars. Small meteorite impacts near colony. Morale is hopeful. We have 1161 food units left.
Population: 20. Small meteorite impacts near colony. I spent the year on prayer. Closest to Juno-28.

meta_awareness: Lyra (year 34): 'Three levels of simulation deep and the colonists at the bottom still argue about rations. The pattern repeats at every scale.'
